metadata=function:1:escape:true:false:true
key-order=length,name,escape,prototype|Symbol(Symbol.species)
arbitrary-this=\\x61\\+b:\\x61\\+b:\\x61\\+b:\\x61\\+b
strict-input=TypeError,TypeError,TypeError,TypeError,TypeError,TypeError,TypeError,TypeError:calls=0
not-constructor=TypeError
c0=\\x00\\x01\\x02\\x03\\x04\\x05\\x06\\x07\\x08\\t\\n\\v\\f\\r\\x0e\\x0f\\x10\\x11\\x12\\x13\\x14\\x15\\x16\\x17\\x18\\x19\\x1a\\x1b\\x1c\\x1d\\x1e\\x1f
space=\\x20
initial-alnum=\\x30z,\\x39z,\\x41z,\\x5az,\\x61z,\\x7az
later-alnum=\\.aA0zZ9
syntax=\\^\\$\\\\\\.\\*\\+\\?\\(\\)\\[\\]\\{\\}\\|\\/
other-punctuator=\\x2c\\x2d\\x3d\\x3c\\x3e\\x23\\x26\\x21\\x25\\x3a\\x3b\\x40\\x7e\\x27\\x60\\x22
underscore=_a0
del=\\\u007f
latin1=\\x80\\x81\\x82\\x83\\x84\\x85\\x86\\x87\\x88\\x89\\x8a\\x8b\\x8c\\x8d\\x8e\\x8f\\x90\\x91\\x92\\x93\\x94\\x95\\x96\\x97\\x98\\x99\\x9a\\x9b\\x9c\\x9d\\x9e\\x9f\\xa0\\xa1\\xa2\\xa3\\xa4\\xa5\\xa6\\xa7\\xa8\\xa9\\xaa\\xab\\xac\\xad\\xae\\xaf\\xb0\\xb1\\xb2\\xb3\\xb4\\xb5\\xb6\\xb7\\xb8\\xb9\\xba\\xbb\\xbc\\xbd\\xbe\\xbf\\xc0\\xc1\\xc2\\xc3\\xc4\\xc5\\xc6\\xc7\\xc8\\xc9\\xca\\xcb\\xcc\\xcd\\xce\\xcf\\xd0\\xd1\\xd2\\xd3\\xd4\\xd5\\xd6\\xd7\\xd8\\xd9\\xda\\xdb\\xdc\\xdd\\xde\\xdf\\xe0\\xe1\\xe2\\xe3\\xe4\\xe5\\xe6\\xe7\\xe8\\xe9\\xea\\xeb\\xec\\xed\\xee\\xef\\xf0\\xf1\\xf2\\xf3\\xf4\\xf5\\xf6\\xf7\\xf8\\xf9\\xfa\\xfb\\xfc\\xfd\\xfe\\xff
whitespace-boundaries=\\xa0\\u1680\u180e\\u2000\u200b\\u2028\\u2029\\u202f\\u205f\\u3000\\ufeff
surrogates=\\ud800X\\udc00:\ud83d\ude00
rope=18002:18005:aaaa\ud83d\ude00bbbb
control-letter=\u0001@1:\u0001@1:\u0001\u0002\u0003@1
control-class-digit=\u0010@1:\u0011@1:\u0018@1:\u0019@1:\u001f@1
control-class-consume=0\u0010@1:\u0010\u0011\u0012@1
control-outside-rollback=\\c0@0:\\@0:\\c@0:null
control-class-rollback=\\@0:c@0:?@0:null
control-unicode=SyntaxError:SyntaxError:SyntaxError:SyntaxError:\u0001@0
r3s-regexp-escape-control-oracle=ok
